channel.title: Transcripts: Prof G Pod (Scott Galloway)
channel.description: YouTube video transcripts from Prof G Pod (Scott Galloway)

item.title: Republicans move “quickly and illegally”
item.description: Rep. Jim Clyburn (D-SC) excoriated the Supreme Court for overturning a re-districting effort by Democrats in Virginia. Scott Galloway and Jessica Tarlov respond, on Raging Moderates.
item.content:encoded:
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/shorts/SDAM94DqxEM

Transcript

I never thought I would see the day that the United States Supreme Court would be so openly partisan with what they've been doing. And I really believe if you look at all of these decisions and you look at the history of the country, I think that Justice Roberts is going to take his place alongside some other infamous justices like Taney who uh gave us the Dred Scott decision. That's pretty serious. You look at how quickly Republicans are moving um sometimes illegally through

the Southern states to change the map and there's this lingering question which I understand why our leadership doesn't want to overtly answer, but there was no way that you knew that this decision was coming. You just took $70 million and lit it on fire. I think a big reason that Republicans continue to chalk up victories despite dissatisfaction with what it feels like just plain corruption and poor leadership is that I think the American public has decided

they would rather have someone who is wrong and effective than someone who is right and ineffective. And that's how I would describe the Democratic Party right now.
